channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Juvenile illegal immigrant gang members behind robbery spree stay out of jail due to age
item.description: Juvenile illegal immigrants in a Venezuelan gang are robbing people in Times Square but remain free due to New York's lenient laws on juvenile crime, an NYPD leader says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Petitions for union representation doubled under Biden's presidency, first increase since 1970s
item.description: There has been a doubling of petitions by workers to have union representation during President Joe Biden’s administration.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Supreme Court opens door to Texas online journalist's lawsuit over her 2017 arrest
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Tuesday ordered a federal appeals court to take a new look at the lawsuit filed by a Texas-based online citizen journalist who said she was wrongly arrested in a case that drew attention from national media organizations and free speech advocates.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Lowriding is more than just cars. It's about family and culture for Mexican Americans
item.description: Lowrider enthusiasts say the predominantly Latino cultural expression may be on the verge of a renaissance.
item.dc:creator: Fernanda Figueroa And Melissa Perez Winder, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: In Missouri, Halloween night signs were required at the homes of sex offenders. Until now
item.description: Many states have laws designed to keep children away from convicted sexual offenders on Halloween night, such as curfews for those on offender registries and requirements to keep their porch lights off.
item.dc:creator: Jim Salter, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Walgreens to close 1,200 US stores
item.description: The plan announced Tuesday includes the closing of 300 stores that had been approved under a previous cost-cutting plan.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Geraldo Rivera backing Harris: Trump 'cannot be trusted to honor the Constitution'
item.description: Television personality Geraldo Rivera revealed Monday that he is backing Vice President Kamala Harris over former President Donald Trump in the election, now less than a month away.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KRON4

item.title: Biden responds to hurricane survivors' fury over the '$750' FEMA payment and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Massive meat recall includes hundreds of products sold at Walmart, Target, more
item.description: Check your fridge and freezer: A massive meat recall linked to possible listeria contamination has impacted hundreds of ready-to-eat meals sold at major grocery store chains across the U.S., including Walmart, Trader Joe's and Target.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: How a Monet painting looted in WWII was tracked to US, returned to family heirs
item.description: An early pastel of a Normandy beach by impressionist master Claude Monet was reunited with the descendants of its rightful owner after research by the Looted Art Commission in Europe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Family that lost 11 in Hurricane Helene mudslides says community sacrificed 'life and limb' to save each other
item.description: Jesse and Mekenzie Craig lost 11 family members in mudslides during Hurricane Helene on Sept. 27. They have been working to pick up the pieces of "Craigtown" for two weeks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Two men shot during Pennsylvania assassination attempt on Trump say Secret Service failed them
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Two men who were shot during the first assassination attempt on Donald Trump this summer say the U.S. Secret Service was “negligent” in protecting the former president and other bystanders at the campaign rally in Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: FEMA temporarily pauses aid in parts of NC over reported threats
item.description: The Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) temporarily paused aid in parts of North Carolina this weekend after alleged threats targeted the agency’s personnel aiding in recovery efforts following Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WGN 9

item.title: Why are scientists so interested in Europa?
item.description: NASA's Europa Clipper soared into space Monday, marking a major step toward exploring one of the most intriguing moons in our solar system.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Which are the most popular Halloween candies in Nevada?
item.description: Are you hoping the neighborhood mischief-makers won’t “T.P.” your house on Halloween? Then maybe you should hand out the candies they actually like.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: List: Here are the nearly 500 Big Lots stores that have or will be closed this year
item.description: Since filing for bankruptcy protection earlier this year, Big Lots has slated nearly 500 stores for closure - some of which have already closed their doors for good.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NJ Transit operator killed, passengers injured after train hits tree
item.description: An NJ Transit train operator is dead and nearly two dozen passengers are injured after a train struck a tree on the tracks Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: NASA launches Europa Clipper, will scour Jupiter moon for ingredients of life
item.description: Coverage of the launch is expected to begin at 11 a.m. ET and will be added to this story in the video player above. The launch window itself is set to open at 12:06 p.m. ET.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press via Nexstar Media Wire, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Armed man arrested near Trump rally denies 'assassination attempt' claims
item.description: “I’m an artist, I’m the last person that would cause any violence and harm to anybody,” the man has since said.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: WATCH: NASA launches Europa Clipper, will scour Jupiter moon for ingredients of life
item.description: Coverage of the launch is expected to begin at 11 a.m. ET and will be added to this story in the video player above. The launch window itself is set to open at 12:06 p.m. ET.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press via Nexstar Media Wire, ABC 4

item.title: Israel says 4 soldiers killed by Hezbollah drone attack while Israeli strike in Gaza leaves 20 dead
item.description: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza Strip (AP) — A Hezbollah drone attack on an army base in central Israel killed four soldiers and severely wounded seven others Sunday, the military said, in the deadliest strike by the militant group since Israel launched its ground invasion of Lebanon nearly two weeks ago.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Man with loaded gun arrested at checkpoint near Donald Trump's weekend rally in Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A Nevada man with a shotgun, loaded handgun, ammunition and several fake passports in his vehicle was arrested at a security checkpoint outside Donald Trump's rally Saturday night in the Southern California desert, authorities said. He was released the same day on $5,000 bail.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER WEBER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump calls for adding 10,000 Border Patrol agents after derailing a bipartisan border bill
item.description: PRESCOTT VALLEY, Ariz. (AP) — Former President Donald Trump on Sunday proposed hiring 10,000 additional Border Patrol agents and giving them a $10,000 retention and signing bonus, after he derailed a bipartisan bill earlier this year that included funding for more border personnel.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What $35 trillion in US national debt means for Americans
item.description: With the national debt standing at more than $35 trillion, economists fear that the country's debt load will only grow.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, Fox 5

item.title: Florida neighbors band together to recover after one-two punch from hurricanes Helene and Milton
item.description: When ankle-deep floodwaters from Hurricane Helene bubbled up through the floors of their home, Kat Robinson-Malone and her husband sent a late-night text message to their neighbors two doors down: “Hey, we're coming.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM and LAURA BARGFELD, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Historic Jersey Shore amusement park closes after generations of family thrills
item.description: OCEAN CITY, N.J. (AP) — For generations of vacationers heading to Ocean City, the towering “Giant Wheel” was the first thing they saw from miles away.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump calls for protester to 'go back home to Mommy' during California rally
item.description: Trump called for the protester to “get the hell knocked out of her,” his latest instance of using violent language when confronted by demonstrators.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What is the purpose of an open-front toilet seat?
item.description: Open-front toilet seats — or “U-shaped” seats — are common in public bathrooms or commercial spaces, but they’re almost never the norm in private residences.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: From the pulpit, Harris calls out Trump for hurricane misinformation. Biden surveys Florida's damage
item.description: GREENVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Kamala Harris used an appearance Sunday before a largely Black church audience in battleground North Carolina to call out Donald Trump for spreading misinformation about the government's hurricane response.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, AAMER MADHANI and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Doubs catches 2 TD passes in his return from a suspension to help Packers rout Cardinals 34-13
item.description: Romeo Doubs wanted to make amends after serving a one-game suspension for what the Green Bay Packers described as conduct detrimental to the team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nearly 200 miles of Blue Ridge Parkway reopens as long-term work remains in North Carolina
item.description: The Blue Ridge Parkway was closed indefinitely after Hurricane Helene swept through the region last month.
item.dc:creator: QCN Digital Staff, WGN 9

item.title: In an engineering feat, mechanical SpaceX arms catch Starship rocket booster back at the launch pad
item.description: SpaceX pulled off the boldest test flight yet of its enormous Starship rocket on Sunday, catching the returning booster back at the launch pad with mechanical arms.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What you should do before and after your phone is stolen or lost
item.description: Phones hold so much of our digital lives — emails, social media and bank accounts, photos, chat messages and more — that if they ever get stolen or go missing, it can cause major disruption
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Biden views Hurricane Milton damage in Florida
item.description: President Joe Biden on Sunday will survey the devastation inflicted on Florida's Gulf Coast by Hurricane Milton as he urges Congress to approve additional emergency disaster funding.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina's mountains, the constant din of a gas-powered generator is getting to be too much for Bobby Renfro.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA AOUN ANGUEIRA, Associated Press, Fox 5
